marks_distribution: Class XI/XII Theory: Max Marks 70, Time 3 hrs
Practicals (Theory + Lab): Max Marks 30, Time 2-3 hrs
competency_weightage: Conceptual understanding emphasized over rote learning
Problem-solving abilities and process skills prioritized
Application of Physics concepts in industrial/technological contexts
internal_assessment: Content excluded from NCERT textbooks not to be tested

evaluation_scheme: Two experiments (one from each section): 14 Marks (7+7)
requirements: Record of at least 8 Experiments (4 from Section A, 4 from Section B)
Record of at least 6 Activities (3 from Section A, 3 from Section B)

components: Written test (15 questions, answer any 10): 10 Marks
Practical Record (at least 5 experiments recorded): 5 Marks

examples: Study factors on internal resistance/EMF of a cell
Variations in current with LDR illumination
Refractive indices using plane mirror and lens
